column1: # /Print Encoded — write setup-string + ASCII page bytes to a `.ENC`
# file. Same submenu as /Print File and /Print Printer (sourced from
# PRINT_FILE_MENU); the only difference is the destination at Go-time
# is a path that always receives the setup string ahead of the body
# (PDF branching does not apply — Encoded is raw printer bytes).
# Set a setup string so we can confirm it lands ahead of the body.
